anti_gaming_validation.details: No @skip decorators, empty tests, TODO/FIXME placeholders, or excessive mocking detected in integration test suite

scenarios.name: Cross-File Channel Consistency
scenarios.description: Validates channels mentioned in framework's Channel Strategy section exist in matrix. Verifies channel inventory contains 10+ distinct channels. Confirms business model coverage across both files.

scenarios.name: Output Template Structure Alignment
scenarios.description: Validates output file template specifies exactly 4 required sections. Confirms template sections align with workflow documentation sections. Verifies all required sections (Executive Summary, Channel Strategy, Budget Allocation, 30-Day Launch Plan) are documented and non-empty.

scenarios.name: Channel Scoring Methodology Consistency
scenarios.description: Validates framework explains channel ranking process (scoring, weighting, modifiers). Confirms Scoring Methodology section exists in matrix with composite score and modifier documentation. Verifies budget modifiers table covers multiple budget ranges.

scenarios.name: Workflow Sequence Integration
scenarios.description: Validates Workflow Sequence section documents 8+ implementation steps. Confirms workflow references the channel selection matrix step. Verifies workflow specifies the output file path (devforgeai/specs/business/marketing/go-to-market.md).

component_interactions_validated.description: Framework references channels and business models that are scored in the matrix
component_interactions_validated.details: Channel Strategy section references channels (Content Marketing, SEO, Email Marketing, etc.) that are defined in the matrix Channel Inventory

component_interactions_validated.description: Output template sections align with documented workflow sections
component_interactions_validated.details: Template defines 4 sections (Executive Summary, Channel Strategy, Budget Allocation, 30-Day Launch Plan) that match full workflow documentation in framework

component_interactions_validated.description: Channel ranking process is documented with reference to scoring weights and modifiers
component_interactions_validated.details: Framework explains ranking steps (identify model, look up weights, apply modifiers, rank channels) that reference the composite scoring formula and budget/audience modifiers in matrix

AC1.title: Channel Selection Matrix Output
AC1.details: Integration tests confirm framework's Channel Strategy references channels that exist in matrix. Channel scoring methodology and budget allocation rules are documented across both files.

AC2.title: 30-Day Launch Action Plan
AC2.details: Unit tests verify action plan structure. Integration tests confirm workflow sequence includes action plan generation step in documented process.

AC3.title: End-to-End Workflow Completion
AC3.details: Integration tests confirm workflow sequence is fully documented with all 8+ steps including output file specification. Framework file under 1000 lines verified.

AC4.title: Ambiguous Input Handling
AC4.details: Framework documents ambiguity and clarification handling section. Unit tests verify clarifying questions are documented.

AC5.title: Output File Structure Validation
AC5.details: Integration tests extensively validate that all 4 required sections (Executive Summary, Channel Strategy, Budget Allocation, 30-Day Launch Plan) are documented and non-empty. Template structure verified.

test_class_summary.notes: Validates channel and business model references across files are consistent
Ensures output template definition matches actual workflow documentation
Validates scoring methodology is properly explained across both reference files
Confirms workflow sequence documents integration points with matrix and output file

observations.note: Comprehensive cross-file reference validation - All channels mentioned in framework exist in matrix scoring tables with business model context
Output template structure properly aligned - 4 required sections (Executive Summary, Channel Strategy, Budget Allocation, 30-Day Launch Plan) are fully documented with non-empty content
Scoring methodology is well-documented - Composite score calculation and budget/audience modifiers are explained with specific modifier ranges ($0, $1-500, $500-2K, etc.)
Workflow sequence is complete - All 8+ steps documented from input gathering through output file confirmation with clear output file path specification

Channel inventory includes 18 total channels with comprehensive coverage across business models. Each business model (SaaS, Marketplace, E-commerce, etc.) has distinct scoring weights reflecting channel-model fit.
Consider adding E2E test simulating complete user workflow: Select business model → Channel ranking → Budget allocation → 30-day plan → Output file generation. Would validate entire integration path.

boundary_1.name: Framework-Matrix Boundary
boundary_1.interaction: Framework Channel Strategy → Matrix Scoring Tables

boundary_2.name: Template-Implementation Boundary
boundary_2.interaction: Output Template Definition → Workflow Section Documentation

boundary_3.name: Methodology Boundary
boundary_3.interaction: Channel Ranking Process → Scoring Methodology + Modifiers

test_isolation_verification.test_independence: PASS (Each test is independent, no shared state)

future_enhancements.item: Add E2E integration scenario test simulating complete GTM workflow: business model selection → channel scoring → budget allocation → action plan generation → output file creation
future_enhancements.rationale: Would validate full cross-component workflow integration end-to-end

future_enhancements.item: Add performance benchmark tests ensuring channel matrix scoring completes within 3-second timeout per NFR-001
future_enhancements.rationale: Currently no performance validation; recommended for production readiness

conclusion: Integration testing for STORY-539 is COMPLETE and PASSING. All cross-file consistency checks pass. Framework and matrix files are properly integrated with correct data references, aligned output structure, and documented methodology. No gaming violations detected. Anti-gaming validation PASSED.
